---
title: "Quickstart"
description: "Run your first CMR simulation"
---

This tutorial walks through a minimal example: loading data, creating a model, and simulating recall.

```{python}
#| eval: false

# Coming soon - placeholder for quickstart tutorial
```

## Next Steps

- [Concepts](../concepts/) - Understand the library architecture
- [Models](../models/) - Learn about CMR and variants
- [Fitting](../evaluation/fitting.qmd) - Fit models to your data
